reviews: The sunglasses collection at Nayan Optics is genuinely impressive. Walked in looking for polarized lenses for driving and left with the perfect pair after trying on at least a dozen options. The staff was knowledgeable about UV protection ratings and polarization without being pushy. Great prices and authentic branded products.

Finally found a shop that could make prescription sunglasses that actually look good. Nayan Optics customized a beautiful aviator frame with my prescription tinted lenses and the result is stunning. You cannot tell they are prescription at all. The clarity outdoors is phenomenal. Highly recommend for anyone who needs prescription sunglasses.

Went to Nayan Optics for sunglasses before a beach vacation and the experience was fantastic. The staff showed me their latest collection and gave honest feedback on what suited my face shape. Ended up buying two pairs because the selection was so good. Both pairs have excellent UV protection and look great.

The staff at Nayan Optics really knows their sunglasses. They explained the difference between UV400 protection, polarization, and photochromic lenses in a way that actually made sense. Helped me choose the right type for my outdoor activities. The pair I bought is comfortable, stylish, and provides excellent glare reduction.

Wanted to gift my wife premium sunglasses for her birthday and was completely overwhelmed by the options. The team at Nayan Optics was incredibly helpful — they asked about her style preferences and face shape and curated a selection of the best options. She absolutely loves the pair I chose. Outstanding customer service.

Have very sensitive eyes and needed high-quality polarized sunglasses for trekking. The staff at Nayan Optics took my requirements seriously and showed me options with the best UV protection and lens quality. The pair I bought has made outdoor activities so much more comfortable. No more squinting or eye fatigue.

Nayan Optics has the best sunglasses collection in the area — from budget-friendly options to premium designer frames. The staff is patient and lets you take your time trying on different styles. The mirror finish on the pair I bought is perfect and the build quality is excellent. Will definitely be back.

Needed sunglasses that could handle both bright sunlight and indoor lighting. The staff at Nayan Optics recommended photochromic lenses and explained exactly how they work. The pair I got transitions perfectly and looks great in any light. Very happy with the recommendation and the overall service.

The sunglasses I bought from Nayan Optics have been through a lot — beach trips, bike rides, long drives — and they still look and perform perfectly. The quality of the lenses and frames is outstanding. The staff helped me choose a pair that was both stylish and durable. Worth every rupee.

Dropped by Nayan Optics just to browse and ended up buying the best sunglasses I have ever owned. The staff was friendly and knowledgeable, helping me understand the difference between various lens types and coatings. The pair I chose fits perfectly and the UV protection is excellent. Highly recommend this shop for sunglasses.

My old sunglasses were scratched beyond use and I needed a replacement before a road trip. Nayan Optics had exactly what I was looking for — a sturdy, polarized pair with good UV protection. The staff helped me find the right fit quickly and the price was very reasonable. Perfect for long drives.

The wraparound sports sunglasses I bought from Nayan Optics are the best I have ever used for cycling. The staff understood exactly what I needed for outdoor sports and showed me options with the right lens curvature and grip. The clarity and glare reduction are exceptional. Highly recommend for sports enthusiasts.

Bought prescription sunglasses from Nayan Optics for the first time and I am amazed at how natural they look. The staff helped me choose a frame that works well with thicker lenses and the tinting is perfect. I can finally enjoy outdoor activities without squinting or switching between glasses. Life-changing purchase.

The children's sunglasses section at Nayan Optics is excellent. My kids were able to choose their own styles from a good selection of durable, UV-protective frames. The staff made sure the fit was right and explained the importance of UV protection for young eyes. Both kids love their new sunglasses.

Nayan Optics helped me find the perfect sunglasses for my face shape, which is notoriously difficult to fit. The staff tried several styles on me and gave honest feedback about what worked and what did not. The pair I ended up with is both flattering and comfortable. Excellent personalized service.

The gradient tinted lenses I got from Nayan Optics are perfect for driving — clear enough at the bottom to see the dashboard but dark enough at the top to block the sun. The staff knew exactly what I needed and found the right pair quickly. The quality is outstanding and the price was fair.

Visited Nayan Optics for replacement lenses for my existing sunglasses frame and they handled it perfectly. They matched the tint exactly and the new lenses are even clearer than the originals.
